title: Default Dark Mode Plus
description: Additions to the original Resource Packs
body:
## These are additions to the original resource pack: [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)
![[Let's Do] HerbalBrews](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16763a2d4fc9406c50fe677dc5bd34341b3a58b7.png)
![Cataclyssm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c122b737ceb648110dc8dc227e8df93b8d2937e.png)
## Resource Packs is designed specifically for [Last Hope](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/last-hopee) modpack


### Mod support:

Alex Caves

Backpacked

[Let's Do] Brewery

L_Ender 's Cataclysm

Supplementaries

Sophisticated Backpacks


Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
Create

Create Stuff & Additions


[Let's Do] HerbalBrews

Immersive Aircraft

Automobile

Iron Chests: Restocked

Inventory Tweaks - ReFoxed

Just Enough Items (JEI)

Cosmetic Armor Reworked

Sophisticated Core

Corpse

## Resource Packs will be updated and the mod support list will be added
